description.value: Semiconductor company parent of SanDisk Technologies, Inc., founded in 2000.

esg_policy.value: Western Digital’s ESG policy commits to achieving net‑zero Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2032 and 100 % carbon‑free energy by 2030, reducing water use and waste, increasing recycled content in products and packaging, and complying with EU RoHS, WEEE and other environmental certifications; socially, it enforces a Supplier Code of Conduct based on the Responsible Business Alliance covering labor rights, health and safety, human rights and ethical business practices, and promotes workforce diversity, occupational health and safety, and employee development; governance is overseen through an ESG governance structure, annual sustainability reporting, adherence to GRI standards and a corporate ethics and compliance program.

sources.name: Western Digital Sets New Corporate Sustainability Targets and Commits to Net Zero Emissions by 2032 | WD
